item.title: SPIKE: swift-markdown Round-Trip Fidelity
item.intent: Validate that swift-markdown can parse markdown, allow AST modifications, and re-emit markdown that preserves original formatting
item.description: Build a test harness that parses markdown via swift-markdown, modifies specific AST nodes (e.g. change heading level, update link URL, rewrite paragraph text), and re-emits markdown. Compare output to expected results. Test with 100+ CommonMark spec examples plus custom GFM cases (tables, task lists, strikethrough). Document any formatting loss. Blocks FEAT-038 (Parser). Updates architecture decision [A-003].
acceptanceCriteria: Test harness runs parse → modify → re-emit on 100+ spec examples
Formatting preservation rate documented (target: >95% of cases)
Known failure cases cataloged with workarounds
Architecture decision [A-003] updated based on findings
